creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
We (kde@) would like to test KDE SC update to 4.14.1.

Patches:
http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/patches/kdesupport-20141012.diff
http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/patches/kdesc-4.14.1-20141012.diff.xz


Before applying the patches execute the following commands (relative to ${PORTSDIR}):

# svn cp 'svn+ssh://svn.freebsd.org/ports/head/misc/kde4-l10n-id/@{2013-09-10}' misc/kde4-l10n-id

# svn mv net-im/kopete-kde4/files/patch-protocols__jabber__googletalk__libjingle__talk__base__httpcommon.cc net-im/kopete-kde4/files/patch-protocols__jabber__libjingle__talk__base__httpcommon.cc
